name: AI Helper & Suggestions
description: Generates contextual task suggestions for the current project using Claude, organized by category (bug fixes, new features, extensions). Supports cancellation, ignored-title filtering, and manual refresh.

Managers/HelperManager.cs.content:
enum SuggestionCategory
    General, BugFixes, NewFeatures, Extensions
class Suggestion
  Title: string
  Description: string
  Category: SuggestionCategory
class HelperManager : IDisposable
  Suggestions: ObservableCollection<Suggestion>
  IsGenerating: bool
  L67: SetActiveTaskSource(Func<IEnumerable<string>> getDescriptions) -> void  // Registers a callback that returns descriptions of currently active (non-finis...
  L72: SwitchProjectAsync(string projectPath) -> Task
  L114: GenerateSuggestionsAsync(string projectPath, SuggestionCategory category, string? guidance = null, CancellationToken externalToken = default) -> Task
  L233: CancelGeneration() -> void
  L241: Dispose() -> void
  L249: ClearSuggestions() -> void
  L255: RemoveSuggestion(Suggestion suggestion) -> void
  L261: IgnoreSuggestion(Suggestion suggestion) -> void
  L272: ClearIgnoredTitles() -> void
  Title: string
  Description: string
  Category: string?

patterns: Cancellable async generation with ObservableCollection binding
Ignored-title set persisted to suppress repetitive suggestions
dependencies: Reads active task descriptions from ObservableCollection<AgentTask>
